context: Spain's music scene in 2000 featured a mix of domestic pop-rock (La Oreja de Van Gogh, Estopa, Alejandro Sanz) and international Latin pop. Santana's 'Supernatural' comeback was a phenomenon. Operación Triunfo had not yet launched (it debuted in 2001), but the Spanish pop-rock scene was thriving with bands from the Basque Country and Catalonia.
